profile.name: José Antonio Pérez González
profile.title: Full-stack web developer and specialized in video games and virtual reality
profile.description: I am a developer with training in web applications and a specialization in video games and virtual reality.

about-me.title: About Me
about-me.description: I am a developer with training in web applications and a specialization in video games and virtual reality. Since childhood, I have been passionate about computing, video games, and technology.

items.degree: Higher Degree in Web Application Development
Specialization in Videogames and Virtual Reality Development

objectives.title: Objectives
objectives.description: I am interested in continuing to grow as a developer in web or interactive projects, combining creativity, technology, and clean code.

availability.title: Availability
description: I am currently available for new projects and collaborations. If you have an interesting idea or need a developer for your team, feel free to contact me.
I am available for remote work and can integrate immediately.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: I have worked on various web development and video game projects, both independently and in teams. Here are some highlighted examples:

controlnet.location: On-site · Jerez de la Frontera, Andalusia
controlnet.name: ControlNet

games.name: Midnight Gallery
games.description: Midnight Gallery is a 2D platformer with puzzle elements in which you play as Kassia, a daring adventurer exploring the darkest and most mysterious corners of history. Her goal is to recover forgotten relics and treasures to enrich a museum dedicated to preserving humanity’s legacy. Throughout her journey, Kassia will face physical challenges, puzzles, and traps that will test her wit and skills.

games.name: Los Giros
games.description: Los Giros is a game where the world is in 3D, but both the enemies and the environments are represented in 2D. You play as John Colt, a bounty hunter who must eliminate all the enemies that stand in his way.

games.name: GlobRush
games.description: In this game, the character’s organs play a key role in the difficulty. Each organ has an “oxygen” percentage, and if it drops below a certain level, “negative effects” are triggered that increase the challenge of the game.

games.name: Purity
games.description: It is a mini-game that consists of helping others to solve their problems, represented by leeches, but helping those leeches consumes you.
